extension.name: VoteSystem
extension.shortDescription: Create a Vote System in TypeWriter
extension.description: A comprehensive TypeWriter extension providing advanced gameplay features for Minecraft servers on Paper 1.21+. Fully compatible with the official TypeWriter engine and PlaceholderAPI.
